claim.text: The system refused a downstream mutation before binding, and this refusal was recorded.
limits: Applies only to this specific mutation event on 2025-05-01
Does not claim system-wide refusal behaviour

object.description: A downstream mutation request rejected by the HOLD gate at pre-binding stage.

conditions.description: Mutation request was received before binding.
HOLD gate was active at time of request.

replay.notes: Replay fixture reproduces the pre-binding HOLD condition.

downstream_effect.description: No downstream mutation occurred. Path confirmed closed.
